name: M2: Region Tagging + Context Dial
description: Tag code ranges in the editor, attach them to agent context, persist tags in SQLite. Build the context management engine with budget tracking and the Context Status Dial + Context Inspector UI.
notes: Region tags use line/column ranges (survive minor edits better than character offsets).
contentHash (SHA-256 of tagged content) enables staleness detection.
Pinned tags are never trimmed by context budget policy.
Token estimation: chars/3.5 for text, chars/3.0 for code (v0.1 approximation).
Context budget thresholds: green <70%, yellow 70-90%, red >90%.

tasks.title: Initialize SQLite persistence layer
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/persistence/sqlite.ts: initialize SQLite database at .tide/tide.db using better-sqlite3 (or sql.js for bundling simplicity). Create database initialization function that creates tables if not exist. Install better-sqlite3 dependency. Set up WAL mode for better concurrent reads.

tasks.title: Create region tag data model and persistence
tasks.description: Create packages/shared/src/types/region-tag.ts: Zod schema for RegionTag (id: UUID, filePath, startLine, startColumn, endLine, endColumn, label, note?, pinned: boolean, contentHash: string, createdAt, updatedAt). Create apps/engine/src/persistence/region-tags.ts: CRUD operations on region_tags SQLite table — createTag, updateTag, deleteTag, listTags(filePath?), getTagsByIds. SQL: CREATE TABLE region_tags with indexed file_path column.

tasks.title: Add region tag IPC messages
tasks.description: Extend packages/shared/src/protocol.ts with region tag request/response message types: region_tags.list, region_tags.create, region_tags.update, region_tags.delete with corresponding response types. Wire into engine IPC handler to route these messages to the region-tags persistence layer.

tasks.title: Build editor region tagging hook
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/Editor/useRegionTags.ts: React hook managing Monaco decorations for region tags. On selection + Cmd+Shift+T: compute contentHash of selected text, open tag popover. On tag creation: call engine IPC region_tags.create, add Monaco decoration (colored range highlight, glyph margin marker, hover tooltip with label). Pinned tags: blue border; unpinned: subtle gray. Load tags for current file on file open.

tasks.title: Build RegionTagPopover component
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/Editor/RegionTagPopover.tsx: inline popover positioned at selection end. Contains: text input for label (auto-focused), optional note textarea, 'Pin to context' checkbox, Create/Cancel buttons. On Create: generates UUID, computes contentHash, calls engine IPC. Keyboard: Enter to create, Escape to cancel.

tasks.title: Create regionTag Zustand store with staleness detection
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/stores/regionTagStore.ts: Zustand store with tags Map<id, RegionTag>, tagsByFile Map<filePath, Set<id>>, staleTags Set<id>. Actions: loadTagsForFile, loadAllTags, createTag, deleteTag, togglePin, updateStaleness. Staleness detection: on file content change (debounced 1s), recompute hash for that file's tagged ranges, mark as stale if mismatch.

tasks.title: Build ContextPack type and context builder engine
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/context/context-pack.ts: ContextItem Zod schema (id, type enum [tide_rules, project_spec, feature_plan, region_tag, file_snippet, repo_map, session_summary, user_attachment], source, content, tokenEstimate, pinned, priority, trimmable). ContextPack schema (items[], totalTokens, budgetTokens, usagePercent, trimmedItems[]). Create apps/engine/src/context/context-builder.ts: ContextBuilder class that assembles items in priority order per spec 8.2 — TIDE.md rules (never trimmable) > active plan > user attachments > pinned tags > PROJECT.md > repo map > session summary. Trimming order: old chat > repo map verbosity > non-pinned attachments.

tasks.title: Implement token estimator and budget tracker
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/context/token-estimator.ts: estimateTokens(text, type: 'code'|'text') using character-based heuristic (chars/3.0 for code, chars/3.5 for text). Create apps/engine/src/context/budget-tracker.ts: BudgetTracker class that maintains running totals, computes usage percentage, determines threshold color (green <70%, yellow 70-90%, red >90%), generates category breakdown for the dial hover (tideRules, activePlan, attachments, taggedRegions, repoMap, sessionSummary). Add context config (modelContextWindow, contextRatio, thresholds).

tasks.title: Build region resolver for context packs
tasks.description: Create apps/engine/src/context/region-resolver.ts: resolveRegions(tagIds) function that loads tags from persistence, reads current file content at tagged ranges, computes staleness (contentHash comparison), estimates tokens per region. Returns ResolvedRegion[] (tag, content, isStale, tokenEstimate). This is used by ContextBuilder when including tagged regions.

tasks.title: Add context IPC messages and endpoints
tasks.description: Add context-related IPC messages: context.get_breakdown (returns BudgetBreakdown), context.get_items (returns ContextItem[]), context.toggle_pin (pin/unpin a context item), context.simulate_budget (simulate budget for a role). Wire into engine handler. Create apps/desktop/src/stores/contextStore.ts: Zustand store with breakdown, contextItems, inspectorOpen state and actions (refreshBreakdown, togglePin, openInspector, closeInspector).

tasks.title: Build Context Status Dial component
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/StatusBar/ContextDial.tsx: SVG arc/ring gauge in the bottom status bar. Shows % budget used as text in center. Color transitions: green (#22c55e) below 70%, yellow (#eab308) 70-90%, red (#ef4444) above 90%. Hover shows tooltip with breakdown by category. Click opens Context Inspector. Polls engine for breakdown updates (or receives push via IPC events).

tasks.title: Build Context Inspector panel
tasks.description: Create apps/desktop/src/components/ContextInspector/ContextInspector.tsx: slide-out panel or tab in the Agent panel area. Scrollable list of context items with: type icon, source path, token estimate, pin/unpin toggle. Trim suggestions section from engine. Role budget simulator: dropdown to select Planner/Builder/Validator, shows estimated budget per role. Search/filter by type. CSS module for styling.
